transcript: Let me kick this evening off with a favorite story of mine. There was a little boy about six years old who came to a balloon seller who was selling balloons on the street.

speakers.name: Speaker1
speakers.voice_reasoning: The voice is warm, friendly, and engaging, with a gentle and clear delivery suitable for telling a heartfelt story to an audience.
speakers.style_direction: A warm and engaging public speaker, telling a favorite story to an audience. His delivery is gentle and inviting, aiming to draw the listeners in.

tagged_transcript: [like a warm public speaker telling a favorite story] Toh is shaam ki shuruaat, main apni ek favorite story se karta hoon. Ek chhe saal ka bachcha sadak par ek balloon-seller ke paas gaya.
original_tagged_transcript: [like a warm public speaker telling a favorite story] Let me kick this evening off with a favorite story of mine. [long pause] There was a little boy about six years old who came to a balloon seller who was selling balloons on the street.
